description: Final polish and quality gates: ensure full monorepo pipeline passes (typecheck, build, test, lint). Fix any issues introduced by new packages. Update root package.json scripts to include docker:up, docker:down, db:migrate, db:seed convenience scripts. Verify all new packages integrate cleanly.
steps: Run pnpm install to register new packages
Run pnpm turbo typecheck and fix any TypeScript errors across the full monorepo
Run pnpm turbo build and fix any build failures
Run pnpm turbo test and fix any test failures
Run pnpm turbo lint and fix any lint errors

Update root package.json to add missing convenience scripts: docker:up (docker compose up -d), docker:down (docker compose down), db:migrate (placeholder for prisma migrate), db:seed (placeholder for seed script)
If any new package causes issues in dependent packages, fix the integration (type exports, barrel exports, etc.)
acceptance_criteria: pnpm turbo typecheck completes with zero errors across ALL packages
pnpm turbo build completes successfully for ALL packages
pnpm turbo test passes for ALL packages
pnpm turbo lint passes for ALL packages
Root package.json has docker:up, docker:down, db:migrate, db:seed scripts
findings: Full monorepo pipeline passes cleanly: typecheck (145/145), build (115/115), test (146/146), lint (119/119). All 3 new packages (data-pipeline, edge-config, security-advanced) integrate without issues. Added convenience scripts to root package.json. One pre-existing lint warning in quantneon (unused eslint-disable directive) - not related to Wave 6 changes.
